QF.id: Retirement Planning Products: National Pension System (NPS)_78

question.text: Under the Auto Choice LC-25 (Conservative), what is the equity allocation at age 55 and above?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Under LC-25 (Conservative), equity reduces to 5% at age 55+, with corporate bonds at 5% and government securities at 90%. **The Trap:** LC-25 starts with only 25% equity and ends at just 5%. It is the most conservative lifecycle option. **Cross-Exam Context:** LC-25 at 55+: E=5%, C=5%, G=90%. LC-50 at 55+: E=10%, C=10%, G=80%. LC-75 at 55+: E=15%, C=10%, G=75%. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** LC-25 is suitable for very conservative investors or those close to retirement who want minimal equity exposure.
